payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Wall-mounted rectangular picture frame with a thin black outer border and white mat surrounding a faint monochrome print; glass-covered and partially cropped at the lower-right and partially occluded by a diagonal wooden railing, with minor glare on the glass — appears about 3.0 meters from the camera.
